title: Wester Balgair Quarry - Millstone Extraction
author: algarvenick
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This model shows one of several curved indents quarried into the rock left from the extraction of millstones. This one has an arc scribed onto the quarried edge to delineate the outline of a millstone for quarrying. Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
